narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 1-B (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,191 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
